seoTitle: Little Jilliby vs Little Pelican — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Little Jilliby and Little Pelican. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Little Jilliby vs Little Pelican: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Little Jilliby and Little Pelican.
heading: Little Jilliby vs Little Pelican — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Little Jilliby, New South Wales and Little Pelican, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Little Pelican has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Little Jilliby (51/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Little Jilliby or Little Pelican safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Little Jilliby has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Little Pelican scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Little Jilliby scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Little Pelican scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Little Jilliby or Little Pelican?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Little Pelican has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
